decisions.label: Keep Homebrew scenario predicates out of remote-stage
decisions.action: remote-stage.mjs will export generic snapshot helpers only; changedHomebrewSourcePaths and hasExpectedHomebrewSourceDiff remain runner/scenario-owned.

decisions.label: Scope env injection to pure arg builders
decisions.action: sshArgs and scpArgs accept env for tests; ssh and scpToRemote read process.env directly.

decisions.label: Acknowledge no real SSH integration in local validation
decisions.action: Local validation will cover syntax, self-test, render-unavailable, and preservation harness; the next live remote workflow run remains the SSH integration gate.
